'''vavulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyknon|pyknon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyknon|pyknon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vavulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vævilith|vævilith]] || [[word:vævilij|vævilij]] || [[word:vævilish|vævilish]] || [[word:vævili|vævili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vavuvuluth|vavuvuluth]] || [[word:vavuvuluj|vavuvuluj]] || [[word:vavuvulush|vavuvulush]] || [[word:vavuvulu|vavuvulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vavuluth|vavuluth]] || [[word:vavuluj|vavuluj]] || [[word:vavulush|vavulush]] || [[word:vavulu|vavulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vavufluth|vavufluth]] || [[word:vavufluj|vavufluj]] || [[word:vavuflush|vavuflush]] || [[word:vavufluf|vavufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vavuluthu|vavuluthu]] || [[word:vavuluju|vavuluju]] || [[word:vavulushu|vavulushu]] || [[word:vavuluku|vavuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vavuluth|vavuluth]] || [[word:vavuluj|vavuluj]] || [[word:vavulush|vavulush]] || [[word:vavulu|vavulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vavuluthul|vavuluthul]] || [[word:vavulujul|vavulujul]] || [[word:vavulushul|vavulushul]] || [[word:vavulukul|vavulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vavuluthuthu|vavuluthuthu]] || [[word:vavulujuju|vavulujuju]] || [[word:vavulushushu|vavulushushu]] || [[word:vavuluku|vavuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vavuluthun|vavuluthun]] || [[word:vavulujun|vavulujun]] || [[word:vavulushun|vavulushun]] || [[word:vavulukun|vavulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vavuluthuoro|vavuluthuoro]] || [[word:vavulujuoro|vavulujuoro]] || [[word:vavulushuoro|vavulushuoro]] || [[word:vavulukuoro|vavulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
